label: raw_price_data
definition:
27 forex pairs × 5 timeframes (1h/4h/1day/1week/1month). Primary OHLCV source for all price-based feature extraction.

**Live BQ stats** (as of 2026-04-21 12:08 UTC): 10,335,096 rows · 19 columns
long_description:

**Layer:** Bronze

**Rows:** 10,335,096  |  **Columns:** 19  |  **Last modified:** 2026-04-21 12:08 UTC

27 forex pairs × 5 timeframes (1h/4h/1day/1week/1month). Primary OHLCV source for all price-based feature extraction.

label: 1h Bars (OHLCV)
definition: 1-hour OHLCV bars. Primary ML input timeframe (SEQ_LEN=60 for Keras CNN). Drives session extraction, ICT structure, Williams %R, ATR coiling, VWAP. 27 pairs 2007→present.
long_description:
## 1h Bars (OHLCV)

**Layer:** Timeframe

1-hour OHLCV bars. Primary ML input timeframe (SEQ_LEN=60 for Keras CNN). Drives session extraction, ICT structure, Williams %R, ATR coiling, VWAP. 27 pairs 2007→present.

**Resolution:** Stored in raw_price_data BQ table with timeframe discriminator column.

label: 4h Bars (OHLCV)
definition: 4-hour OHLCV bars. Used by silver_smart_money for multi-timeframe ICT structure: 4h BOS, CHoCH, swing highs/lows, Order Block and FVG identification. MTF join in ml_ready.
long_description:
## 4h Bars (OHLCV)

**Layer:** Timeframe

4-hour OHLCV bars. Used by silver_smart_money for multi-timeframe ICT structure: 4h BOS, CHoCH, swing highs/lows, Order Block and FVG identification. MTF join in ml_ready.

**Resolution:** Stored in raw_price_data BQ table with timeframe discriminator column.

label: Daily Bars (OHLCV)
definition: Daily OHLCV bars. ADR and DDR calculation basis. True daily high/low for session_ranges sweep counts. Seasonal bias anchor. Asia/CBDR body ranges extracted at daily granularity.
long_description:
## Daily Bars (OHLCV)

**Layer:** Timeframe

Daily OHLCV bars. ADR and DDR calculation basis. True daily high/low for session_ranges sweep counts. Seasonal bias anchor. Asia/CBDR body ranges extracted at daily granularity.

**Resolution:** Stored in raw_price_data BQ table with timeframe discriminator column.

label: Weekly Bars (OHLCV)
definition: Weekly OHLCV bars. Weekly state features: prior Friday close position, weekly_bias, weekly_range vs ADR. COT weekly alignment. Presidential cycle week number.
long_description:
## Weekly Bars (OHLCV)

**Layer:** Timeframe

Weekly OHLCV bars. Weekly state features: prior Friday close position, weekly_bias, weekly_range vs ADR. COT weekly alignment. Presidential cycle week number.

**Resolution:** Stored in raw_price_data BQ table with timeframe discriminator column.

label: Monthly Bars (OHLCV)
definition: Monthly OHLCV bars. Seasonal and presidential cycle bias. Monthly close position for macro regime context. seasonal_biases table reference month.
long_description:
## Monthly Bars (OHLCV)

**Layer:** Timeframe

Monthly OHLCV bars. Seasonal and presidential cycle bias. Monthly close position for macro regime context. seasonal_biases table reference month.

**Resolution:** Stored in raw_price_data BQ table with timeframe discriminator column.

label:
Asia Session
20:00–00:00 NY
definition: Asia session body range (GREATEST/LEAST of open/close, 20:00–23:59 NY). ICT accumulation zone. When asia_raw ≤ 35 pips → daily anchor. Weekly persistence: LAST_VALUE IGNORE NULLS within WEEK(FRIDAY). Tracked in silver_session_ranges.
long_description:
## Asia Session 20:00–00:00 NY

**Layer:** Session

Asia session body range (GREATEST/LEAST of open/close, 20:00–23:59 NY). ICT accumulation zone. When asia_raw ≤ 35 pips → daily anchor. Weekly persistence: LAST_VALUE IGNORE NULLS within WEEK(FRIDAY). Tracked in silver_session_ranges.

**ICT concept:** Session window extracted from 1h bars using NY timezone conversion.

label:
CBDR
14:00–20:00 NY
definition: Central Bank Dealing Range. Body candles 14:00–20:00 NY. Fallback anchor when Asia > 35 pips and cbdr_pips ≤ 40. cbdr_pips and cbdr_valid flow directly into ml_ready and chronos_input. Primary manipulation session.
long_description:
## CBDR 14:00–20:00 NY

**Layer:** Session

Central Bank Dealing Range. Body candles 14:00–20:00 NY. Fallback anchor when Asia > 35 pips and cbdr_pips ≤ 40. cbdr_pips and cbdr_valid flow directly into ml_ready and chronos_input. Primary manipulation session.

**ICT concept:** Session window extracted from 1h bars using NY timezone conversion.

label:
London Open
02:00–05:00 NY
definition: London Open session. is_london flag in session_labels. Stop hunts above Asia high common before NY delivery. 4h BOS/CHoCH often forms here. MTF ICT structure detected during this window.
long_description:
## London Open 02:00–05:00 NY

**Layer:** Session

London Open session. is_london flag in session_labels. Stop hunts above Asia high common before NY delivery. 4h BOS/CHoCH often forms here. MTF ICT structure detected during this window.

**ICT concept:** Session window extracted from 1h bars using NY timezone conversion.

label:
NY Open
08:30–11:00 NY
definition: New York AM session. Primary STDV delivery window. is_ny flag in session_labels. Main window for tgt_hi/tgt_lo hits. Silver Bullet time window (09:50–11:00) nested inside this session.
long_description:
## NY Open 08:30–11:00 NY

**Layer:** Session

New York AM session. Primary STDV delivery window. is_ny flag in session_labels. Main window for tgt_hi/tgt_lo hits. Silver Bullet time window (09:50–11:00) nested inside this session.

**ICT concept:** Session window extracted from 1h bars using NY timezone conversion.

label:
NY PM
13:00–16:00 NY
(planned)
definition: New York PM session. Not yet explicitly tracked. Relevant for late-day distribution and reversals into Asia open. Planned as separate session flag in silver_smart_money.
long_description:
## NY PM 13:00–16:00 NY (planned)

**Layer:** Planned

New York PM session. Not yet explicitly tracked. Relevant for late-day distribution and reversals into Asia open. Planned as separate session flag in silver_smart_money.

**Status:** Not yet built. Included to show future pipeline direction.

label:
Silver Bullet
09:50–11:00 NY
(planned)
definition: ICT Silver Bullet time window — high-probability FVG fill nested inside NY Open. Not yet explicitly flagged. Planned for silver_smart_money session_frame column expansion.
long_description:
## Silver Bullet 09:50–11:00 NY (planned)

**Layer:** Planned

ICT Silver Bullet time window — high-probability FVG fill nested inside NY Open. Not yet explicitly flagged. Planned for silver_smart_money session_frame column expansion.

**Status:** Not yet built. Included to show future pipeline direction.

label:
Accumulation
(Asia builds range)
definition: Smart money accumulates positions during Asia session. Asia body range defines the consolidation zone. When asia_raw ≤ 35 pips it becomes the daily anchor_high/anchor_low for all STDV projections. This is the 'A' in Accumulation/Manipulation/Distribution.
long_description:
## Accumulation (Asia builds range)

**Layer:** Power3

Smart money accumulates positions during Asia session. Asia body range defines the consolidation zone. When asia_raw ≤ 35 pips it becomes the daily anchor_high/anchor_low for all STDV projections. This is the 'A' in Accumulation/Manipulation/Distribution.

**ICT Power of 3:** Accumulation → Manipulation → Distribution. Full cycle typically spans Asia → London → NY sessions.

label:
Manipulation
(CBDR / stop hunt)
definition: Smart money manipulates: London/CBDR breaks or extends Asia range to trigger retail stops. daily_highs/lows_swept_20d (sweep counts) quantifies manipulation intensity. CBDR becomes anchor fallback when Asia > 35 pips. The 'M' in Power of 3.
long_description:
## Manipulation (CBDR / stop hunt)

**Layer:** Power3

Smart money manipulates: London/CBDR breaks or extends Asia range to trigger retail stops. daily_highs/lows_swept_20d (sweep counts) quantifies manipulation intensity. CBDR becomes anchor fallback when Asia > 35 pips. The 'M' in Power of 3.

**ICT Power of 3:** Accumulation → Manipulation → Distribution. Full cycle typically spans Asia → London → NY sessions.

label:
Distribution
(NY delivers to STDV)
definition: True directional delivery during NY AM session. Price moves from anchor toward STDV targets (tgt_hi_1_0 through tgt_hi_4_0 or tgt_lo_*). silver_stdv_touch_log records which targets were hit and reversal bar confirmations. The 'D' in Power of 3.
long_description:
## Distribution (NY delivers to STDV)

**Layer:** Power3

True directional delivery during NY AM session. Price moves from anchor toward STDV targets (tgt_hi_1_0 through tgt_hi_4_0 or tgt_lo_*). silver_stdv_touch_log records which targets were hit and reversal bar confirmations. The 'D' in Power of 3.

**ICT Power of 3:** Accumulation → Manipulation → Distribution. Full cycle typically spans Asia → London → NY sessions.

label: 5-Day Window
definition: 5-day rolling window. Used for ddr_adr_5d (short-term ADR for current volatility context in chronos_input).
long_description:
## 5-Day Window

**Layer:** Lookback

5-day rolling window. Used for ddr_adr_5d (short-term ADR for current volatility context in chronos_input).

**Window type:** Rolling lookback applied to price or COT data during silver feature computation.

label: 20-Day Window
definition: Most-used lookback. ATR_20d, ADR_20d, MA_20d, COT_pct_20d, carry_z_20d, liquidity sweep counts 20d, price_pos_20d, high/low_dist_20d. Foundation of volatility and positioning signals.
long_description:
## 20-Day Window

**Layer:** Lookback

Most-used lookback. ATR_20d, ADR_20d, MA_20d, COT_pct_20d, carry_z_20d, liquidity sweep counts 20d, price_pos_20d, high/low_dist_20d. Foundation of volatility and positioning signals.

**Window type:** Rolling lookback applied to price or COT data during silver feature computation.

label: 40-Day Window
definition: 40-day rolling window. ATR_40d, ADR_40d, MA_40d, COT_pct_40d, price_pos_40d, high/low_dist_40d. Medium-term volatility and positioning regime.
long_description:
## 40-Day Window

**Layer:** Lookback

40-day rolling window. ATR_40d, ADR_40d, MA_40d, COT_pct_40d, price_pos_40d, high/low_dist_40d. Medium-term volatility and positioning regime.

**Window type:** Rolling lookback applied to price or COT data during silver feature computation.

label: 60-Day Window
definition: 60-day rolling window. ATR_60d, MA_60d, price_pos_60d, liquidity sweep counts 60d. 60d anchor_range_high/low in silver_smart_money. Seasonal context threshold.
long_description:
## 60-Day Window

**Layer:** Lookback

60-day rolling window. ATR_60d, MA_60d, price_pos_60d, liquidity sweep counts 60d. 60d anchor_range_high/low in silver_smart_money. Seasonal context threshold.

**Window type:** Rolling lookback applied to price or COT data during silver feature computation.

label: Quarterly Window
definition: Quarterly (13-week) rolling window. ATR_Q, price_pos_Q. Presidential and fiscal Q cycle alignment. Q open/high/low features. Quarterly OHLCV pattern context.
long_description:
## Quarterly Window

**Layer:** Lookback

Quarterly (13-week) rolling window. ATR_Q, price_pos_Q. Presidential and fiscal Q cycle alignment. Q open/high/low features. Quarterly OHLCV pattern context.

**Window type:** Rolling lookback applied to price or COT data during silver feature computation.

label: 1-Year COT Window
definition: 1-year COT lookback. cot_pct_1yr: rolling percentile of net commercial over 12 months. Key medium-term positioning signal. Part of COT anchor period encoding (5-window cascade).
long_description:
## 1-Year COT Window

**Layer:** Lookback

1-year COT lookback. cot_pct_1yr: rolling percentile of net commercial over 12 months. Key medium-term positioning signal. Part of COT anchor period encoding (5-window cascade).

**Window type:** Rolling lookback applied to price or COT data during silver feature computation.

label: 4-Year COT Window
definition: 4-year (presidential cycle) COT lookback. cot_pct_4yr: long-cycle positioning percentile. Maximum standard window. anchor_points max_long/max_short over 4yr cycle. Seasonal bias aligned to presidential year (1-4).
long_description:
## 4-Year COT Window

**Layer:** Lookback

4-year (presidential cycle) COT lookback. cot_pct_4yr: long-cycle positioning percentile. Maximum standard window. anchor_points max_long/max_short over 4yr cycle. Seasonal bias aligned to presidential year (1-4).

**Window type:** Rolling lookback applied to price or COT data during silver feature computation.

label:
ATR / Volatility
(4 windows)
definition: Average True Range family: atr_20d, atr_40d, atr_60d, atr_q. Coiling ratio and EXPANSION/CONTRACTION/COILING state (silver_atr_coiling). atr_ratio_20d (ATR vs ADR). Volatility regime context for all models.
long_description:
## ATR / Volatility (4 windows)

**Layer:** Feature

Average True Range family: atr_20d, atr_40d, atr_60d, atr_q. Coiling ratio and EXPANSION/CONTRACTION/COILING state (silver_atr_coiling). atr_ratio_20d (ATR vs ADR). Volatility regime context for all models.

**Feature group:** Cluster of related derived columns computed from raw data and lookback windows.

label: ADR / Dealing Range
definition: Average Daily Range family: adr_5d, adr_20d, adr_40d, adr_60d (true NY-session range). ddr_full_range, ddr_ny_open, ddr_ny_range. Basis for STDV step size: stdv_step = anchor_raw (when anchor source = ASIA/CBDR) or combined/2 (FLOUT). cbdr_pips from CBDR body.
long_description:
## ADR / Dealing Range

**Layer:** Feature

Average Daily Range family: adr_5d, adr_20d, adr_40d, adr_60d (true NY-session range). ddr_full_range, ddr_ny_open, ddr_ny_range. Basis for STDV step size: stdv_step = anchor_raw (when anchor source = ASIA/CBDR) or combined/2 (FLOUT). cbdr_pips from CBDR body.

**Feature group:** Cluster of related derived columns computed from raw data and lookback windows.

label:
STDV Projection Targets
(×6 levels)
definition: Standard Deviation price targets. 12 levels per day: tgt_hi_1_0/1_5/2_0/2_5/3_0/4_0 (upside from anchor_low) + tgt_lo_* (downside from anchor_high). Hierarchy: Asia ≤ 35p → CBDR ≤ 40p → FLOUT → EXCEEDED (ADR/2 fallback). Weekly persistence via LAST_VALUE.
long_description:
## STDV Projection Targets (×6 levels)

**Layer:** Feature

Standard Deviation price targets. 12 levels per day: tgt_hi_1_0/1_5/2_0/2_5/3_0/4_0 (upside from anchor_low) + tgt_lo_* (downside from anchor_high). Hierarchy: Asia ≤ 35p → CBDR ≤ 40p → FLOUT → EXCEEDED (ADR/2 fallback). Weekly persistence via LAST_VALUE.

**Feature group:** Cluster of related derived columns computed from raw data and lookback windows.

label:
COT Positioning
(weekly, 7 pairs)
definition: CFTC COT rolling features: net_commercial (long minus short), cot_pct_6mo/1yr (rolling percentile). Also: raw non-commercial long/short, OI, extreme_long/extreme_short flags. Updated Fri 20:30 UTC. 54 total COT cols in ml_ready.
long_description:
## COT Positioning (weekly, 7 pairs)

**Layer:** Feature

CFTC COT rolling features: net_commercial (long minus short), cot_pct_6mo/1yr (rolling percentile). Also: raw non-commercial long/short, OI, extreme_long/extreme_short flags. Updated Fri 20:30 UTC. 54 total COT cols in ml_ready.

**Feature group:** Cluster of related derived columns computed from raw data and lookback windows.

label:
COT Anchor Periods
(40 cols × 5 windows)
definition: ICT-style anchor period COT encoding. 87 periods per currency (2012→2099), 5 lookback windows (6mo/1yr/4yr/8yr/12yr). Per window: max_long, min_long, mean_net, std_net, current_pct. Range-joined to hourly bars in ml_ready. 40 cols total.
long_description:
## COT Anchor Periods (40 cols × 5 windows)

**Layer:** Feature

ICT-style anchor period COT encoding. 87 periods per currency (2012→2099), 5 lookback windows (6mo/1yr/4yr/8yr/12yr). Per window: max_long, min_long, mean_net, std_net, current_pct. Range-joined to hourly bars in ml_ready. 40 cols total.

**Feature group:** Cluster of related derived columns computed from raw data and lookback windows.

label:
ICT Market Structure
(BOS / CHoCH)
definition: Smart Money Concepts from silver_smart_money. Per pair/timeframe: swing_high, swing_low, market_structure_bias (bullish/bearish), last_bos_type (BOS/CHoCH), bos_distance_pips. Multi-timeframe joins: same/4h/daily/weekly/monthly in ml_ready.
long_description:
## ICT Market Structure (BOS / CHoCH)

**Layer:** Feature

Smart Money Concepts from silver_smart_money. Per pair/timeframe: swing_high, swing_low, market_structure_bias (bullish/bearish), last_bos_type (BOS/CHoCH), bos_distance_pips. Multi-timeframe joins: same/4h/daily/weekly/monthly in ml_ready.

**Feature group:** Cluster of related derived columns computed from raw data and lookback windows.

label: Fair Value Gaps (FVG)
definition: Imbalance / FVG detection from silver_smart_money. nearest_fvg_high/low, fvg_distance_pips, fvg_type (bullish/bearish), fvg_filled (bool). ICT fair value zone between two candles with a price gap — institutional rebalancing target.
long_description:
## Fair Value Gaps (FVG)

**Layer:** Feature

Imbalance / FVG detection from silver_smart_money. nearest_fvg_high/low, fvg_distance_pips, fvg_type (bullish/bearish), fvg_filled (bool). ICT fair value zone between two candles with a price gap — institutional rebalancing target.

**Feature group:** Cluster of related derived columns computed from raw data and lookback windows.

label: Order Blocks (OB)
definition: Order block detection from silver_smart_money. nearest_ob_high/low, ob_distance_pips, ob_strength, ob_type (bullish/bearish). Last opposing candle before a BOS — institutional entry and re-entry zone.
long_description:
## Order Blocks (OB)

**Layer:** Feature

Order block detection from silver_smart_money. nearest_ob_high/low, ob_distance_pips, ob_strength, ob_type (bullish/bearish). Last opposing candle before a BOS — institutional entry and re-entry zone.

**Feature group:** Cluster of related derived columns computed from raw data and lookback windows.

label:
Liquidity Sweeps
(20 / 40 / 60d)
definition: Draw-on-Liquidity quantification from silver_session_ranges. daily_highs_swept_20d/40d/60d and daily_lows_swept_20d/40d/60d: count of prior daily highs/lows broken today. Single self-join up to 60d with conditional aggregation for all three windows.
long_description:
## Liquidity Sweeps (20 / 40 / 60d)

**Layer:** Feature

Draw-on-Liquidity quantification from silver_session_ranges. daily_highs_swept_20d/40d/60d and daily_lows_swept_20d/40d/60d: count of prior daily highs/lows broken today. Single self-join up to 60d with conditional aggregation for all three windows.

**Feature group:** Cluster of related derived columns computed from raw data and lookback windows.

label: Carry Differentials
definition: Carry trade features from silver_carry_features. pair_carry_diff (policy rate spread), carry_vs_adr (carry/volatility ratio for normalized signal), carry_z_20d, carry_z_90d, carry_momentum_5d/20d. 17 cross pairs, Dataform incremental SQLX.
long_description:
## Carry Differentials

**Layer:** Feature

Carry trade features from silver_carry_features. pair_carry_diff (policy rate spread), carry_vs_adr (carry/volatility ratio for normalized signal), carry_z_20d, carry_z_90d, carry_momentum_5d/20d. 17 cross pairs, Dataform incremental SQLX.

**Feature group:** Cluster of related derived columns computed from raw data and lookback windows.

label:
Macro / Fundamental
(18 cols)
definition: 18 macro columns in ml_ready: dgs2/5/10/30 (US yields), t10y2y (yield spread), dfii10 (real yield), us_gdp/cpi/unemployment, fed_funds_rate, dxy_index, gold_price, crude_oil_price, vix_index, gsci_index, futures_volume, futures_settle. Forward-filled daily.
long_description:
## Macro / Fundamental (18 cols)

**Layer:** Feature

18 macro columns in ml_ready: dgs2/5/10/30 (US yields), t10y2y (yield spread), dfii10 (real yield), us_gdp/cpi/unemployment, fed_funds_rate, dxy_index, gold_price, crude_oil_price, vix_index, gsci_index, futures_volume, futures_settle. Forward-filled daily.

**Feature group:** Cluster of related derived columns computed from raw data and lookback windows.

label: Seasonal / Cycle Biases
definition: Temporal cycle features: month, day_of_week, is_quarter_start/end, quarter_number, presidential_cycle_year (1-4), seasonal_bias (monthly directional bias per pair from seasonal_biases table), is_fomc_week, is_nfp_week. Frozen/deterministic — full rebuild only.
long_description:
## Seasonal / Cycle Biases

**Layer:** Feature

Temporal cycle features: month, day_of_week, is_quarter_start/end, quarter_number, presidential_cycle_year (1-4), seasonal_bias (monthly directional bias per pair from seasonal_biases table), is_fomc_week, is_nfp_week. Frozen/deterministic — full rebuild only.

**Feature group:** Cluster of related derived columns computed from raw data and lookback windows.

label:
Weekly State
(21 cols)
definition: Friday-bridged weekly context (21 cols in ml_ready): prior_friday_close, friday_close_pos vs ADR, weekly_range vs ADR, weekly_bias (calculated vs actual close direction), friday_cot_extreme_long/short, friday_pct_rank_4w, COT index_4w. Monday context bridge from friday_anchor table.
long_description:
## Weekly State (21 cols)

**Layer:** Feature

Friday-bridged weekly context (21 cols in ml_ready): prior_friday_close, friday_close_pos vs ADR, weekly_range vs ADR, weekly_bias (calculated vs actual close direction), friday_cot_extreme_long/short, friday_pct_rank_4w, COT index_4w. Monday context bridge from friday_anchor table.

**Feature group:** Cluster of related derived columns computed from raw data and lookback windows.

label: silver_daily_dealing_range
definition:
True NY-session ADR rolling 5/20/40/60d. Day high/low, NY open/range, full session range in pips. Feeds silver_session_ranges stdv_step and ml_ready ddr_* columns. Also a direct input to chronos_input.

**Live BQ stats** (as of 2026-04-21 09:05 UTC): 120,906 rows · 16 columns
long_description:
## silver_daily_dealing_range

**Layer:** Silver

**Rows:** 120,906  |  **Columns:** 16  |  **Last modified:** 2026-04-21 09:05 UTC

True NY-session ADR rolling 5/20/40/60d. Day high/low, NY open/range, full session range in pips. Feeds silver_session_ranges stdv_step and ml_ready ddr_* columns. Also a direct input to chronos_input.

**Built by:** Dataform incremental SQLX (silver tag) or Cloud Run Python job.

label: silver_session_ranges
definition:
86k rows. ICT daily anchor + 12 STDV price targets (tgt_hi/lo 1.0–4.0σ) + cbdr_pips/valid + 6 liquidity sweep counts (20/40/60d). Weekly LAST_VALUE persistence. Joins to ml_ready on pair + session_date.

**Live BQ stats** (as of 2026-04-21 09:05 UTC): 129,713 rows · 29 columns
long_description:
## silver_session_ranges

**Layer:** Silver

**Rows:** 129,713  |  **Columns:** 29  |  **Last modified:** 2026-04-21 09:05 UTC

86k rows. ICT daily anchor + 12 STDV price targets (tgt_hi/lo 1.0–4.0σ) + cbdr_pips/valid + 6 liquidity sweep counts (20/40/60d). Weekly LAST_VALUE persistence. Joins to ml_ready on pair + session_date.

**Built by:** Dataform incremental SQLX (silver tag) or Cloud Run Python job.

label: silver_smart_money
definition:

label: silver_stdv_levels
definition:
72-column daily STDV price projection table. tgt_hi/lo 1.0–4.0σ per pair per session_date. Training-time join on pair + DATE(timestamp) = session_date to label which STDV levels price reached intraday.

label:
Keras CNN Dealer
(local only · not deployed)
definition: Keras CNN model files exist locally (production_dealer_master_model_v2_seasonals.h5 + quarterly_patch_20260222.h5 + advanced_cot_cnn_transformer.h5). parallel_inference.py script written. NOT yet deployed as a scheduled Cloud Run job — no production inference running. Planned: 4GB Cloud Run container, SEQ_LEN=60 1h bars, direction/confidence/price_target/volatility_regime output.
long_description:
## Keras CNN Dealer (local only · not deployed)

**Layer:** Planned

Keras CNN model files exist locally (production_dealer_master_model_v2_seasonals.h5 + quarterly_patch_20260222.h5 + advanced_cot_cnn_transformer.h5). parallel_inference.py script written. NOT yet deployed as a scheduled Cloud Run job — no production inference running. Planned: 4GB Cloud Run container, SEQ_LEN=60 1h bars, direction/confidence/price_target/volatility_regime output.

**Status:** Not yet built. Included to show future pipeline direction.

label:
Chronos 2 Large
(1–30 day horizon)
definition: Amazon Chronos 2 Large (chronos-t5-large) on L4 GPU. 1040-day context, 30 trading day horizon. 32 past covariates. q10/q50/q90/mean_forecast, trend_direction, trend_strength_pct. 810 rows/run (27 pairs × 30 days). 18.6s inference. LIVE Apr 2026.
long_description:
## Chronos 2 Large (1–30 day horizon)

**Layer:** Model

Amazon Chronos 2 Large (chronos-t5-large) on L4 GPU. 1040-day context, 30 trading day horizon. 32 past covariates. q10/q50/q90/mean_forecast, trend_direction, trend_strength_pct. 810 rows/run (27 pairs × 30 days). 18.6s inference. LIVE Apr 2026.

**Inference:** Cloud Run job. Reads Gold tables, writes forecast output to BQ.

label:
TimeGPT (Nixtla)
(21-day horizon)
definition: Nixtla TimeGPT macro regime model. All 27 pairs in 1 API call. 24 exogenous features, 21-day horizon, level=[80,90]. q10/q50/q90 + trend_direction/strength. Monday 07:45 UTC. LIVE Apr 2026.
long_description:

**Layer:** Model

**Inference:** Cloud Run job. Reads Gold tables, writes forecast output to BQ.

label:
RL Meta-Learner
(Sat · planned)
definition: Planned XGBoost/RL meta-learner. Trains on outcome_evaluation (T-7 predictions vs actuals from Chronos + TimeGPT). Learns: when to trust which model, which feature domains dominate per regime. Saturday-only, gate-gated. Not yet built.
long_description:
